name: qa-audit-cli
description: Config-driven TypeScript and Playwright QA audit CLI

scripts.audit: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js --config qa-audit.config.example.json

scripts.demo:install: node -e "console.log('Demo project has no dependencies in the initial skeleton.')"
